_meta.note: Canonical machine-readable export of the CURRENT system. Light + dark values included. This is the source to build against; design-system.md is the prose explanation. Tailwind v4 is CSS-first via the @theme block in src/App.css (NO tailwind.config.js as token source — the existing shim is incomplete and should be deleted).
openQuestions: TWO TEALS: --color-background-ui (#0FA697) is the primary ACTION teal (Button, ToggleSwitch); --color-logo-primary (#16B8A3 light / #2FD3BD dark) is the brand/ACCENT teal. The redesign should split these into a documented --color-action vs --color-accent and pin focus rings to ONE token.
Type/spacing scales are de-facto (arbitrary Tailwind values inline). The named slots below formalize what exists; the redesign should adopt a deliberate scale.
Status + project-palette colors are raw Tailwind palette hexes hardcoded in TSX; they are tokenized here so they stop living inline.

color._comment: The 7 @theme tokens. 4 have dark overrides; 3 (background-ui, text-stroke, mid-gray) are theme-agnostic.

action.usage: PRIMARY ACTION teal — Button fill, ToggleSwitch on-state. (No dark override today; verify contrast on dark.)

accent.usage: BRAND/ACCENT teal — logo fill, active nav, signature highlights

midGray.usage: borders, dividers, muted text — almost always at low opacity (/10 /15 /20 /40 /80)

status._comment: Session status colors — currently raw Tailwind classes hardcoded in STATUS_META (SessionsView.tsx). Tokenized here.

danger.usage: errors (askErr, recording-error text) — currently raw, should route through a token

projectPalette._comment: 10-swatch auto-assigned per-project accent (PALETTE in SessionsView.tsx); user-overridable via SwatchPicker, persisted to the project_colors setting. This is the organizing visual spine of Sessions — carry the assigned color through tile, drawer header, status, and transcript attribution.

scrollbarThumb.note: non-macOS only; macOS uses native overlay scrollbars

fontFamily.warning: The main UI sets size/weight/smoothing but NO font-family on :root/body — it inherits the WKWebView default, which is NOT reliably San Francisco. Only the overlay (RecordingOverlay.css) sets the SF stack. The redesign MUST set an explicit, self-hosted stack on the main app, e.g. `-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, sans-serif`. See native-constraints.md → Typography.

sizeSlots._comment: De-facto sizes appearing as arbitrary Tailwind values (esp. across Sessions). Formalize into a named scale.

borderOpacityLadder._comment: mid-gray is almost always used at one of these alphas for borders/dividers/muted text.

elevation._comment: Two scales exist — the named --elev-* (light+dark aware, preferred) and ad-hoc Tailwind shadow-lg/2xl. Standardize on --elev-*.

motion._comment: Brand easings live ONLY in App.css today (unreachable from Tailwind utilities). Recommend exposing as Tailwind transitionTimingFunction tokens. See motion.md for the per-interaction map.

easeOutQuint.usage: entrances, hovers, brand rise — default 'out' curve

overlay._comment: The recording overlay is a SEPARATE Tauri window themed independently (RecordingOverlay.css) — editing App.css tokens does NOT restyle it. Listed so the system stays cohesive.

scrim.note: fake-translucency fill; should become real HudWindow vibrancy

signal.name: lime
signal.usage: mic-level / live signal accent (undocumented; reconcile with brand teal)
